\caption{Patchback (multiple-choice) aggregated over tasks. $|\mathcal{F}|$ counts baseline$\to$ablated flips. Rescue rates are computed on flips and aggregated across tasks by summing rescued/total. \label{tab:patchback_mc_agg}
